notes: Source is Postman Collection v2.1.0 export, not live OpenAPI spec
Doc says response envelope is {success,data,message} but ACTUAL is {type:'response',data:{}}
Doc mentions versioning /v{n}/endpoint but NO endpoints use versioned paths
baseUrl variable set to 'farming-simulator.pstmn.io' (Postman placeholder - IGNORE)
Several endpoint descriptions copy-pasted from Postman docs about 'collections'
Some response examples show wrong entity data (tag data in domain responses)
/me endpoint returns apiToken and current_password in response - SENSITIVE

base_urls.notes: Documented in collection description, confirmed working
DOC ARTIFACT - Postman placeholder variable, IGNORE

transport.join_rule: baseUrl + '/' + path (paths do NOT start with /, no double slashes)

options.notes: Primary auth - configured in collection auth block, all examples use this
NOT seen in any actual requests - may be mentioned in docs but collection uses X-API-KEY exclusively

auth.recommended_reasoning: Collection auth block explicitly configures X-API-KEY. All 51 endpoints inherit this. No Bearer examples exist in the collection. Use X-API-KEY unless API returns 401, then test Bearer as fallback.

rate_limits.backoff_strategy: On 429: read X-RateLimit-Reset (Unix timestamp), wait until reset + 1s jitter. If header missing, exponential backoff starting 1s, max 60s.

response_envelope.doc_vs_reality: MISMATCH - Doc claims {success:true/false} but actual is {type:'response'|'error'}

status_codes.200: OK - Success (used for GET, POST creates, PUT updates, DELETE)
status_codes.201: Created - Documented but 200 used in practice
status_codes.400: Bad Request - Returned in error.status field

endpoints.title: Get Authenticated User
endpoints.description: Gets information about the authenticated user. Use to verify API key validity.
edge_cases: Response contains apiToken and current_password - MUST redact from logs

endpoints.title: Get Connected Integrations
endpoints.description: Gets integrations connected to the platform

endpoints.title: Send Broadcast Email
endpoints.description: Send a broadcast email to contacts
edge_cases: DESTRUCTIVE - Sends live emails. Require explicit confirmation.

endpoints.title: Create Field
endpoints.description: Create a broadcast email field (type or product)

endpoints.title: Get Activity Levels
endpoints.description: Get contact counts by activity level for email targeting

tagId.description: Filter by tag, null for all

endpoints.title: Get Fields
endpoints.description: Get broadcast email fields (types and products)

endpoints.title: Get a Contact
endpoints.description: Get a single contact by ID
edge_cases: Contains PII (email, phone) - redact in logs

endpoints.title: Get all Contacts
endpoints.description: Get all contacts with pagination and filtering

pagination.notes: Response includes total count for calculating pages

edge_cases: Contains PII - redact emails/phones in logs

endpoints.title: Create a Contact
edge_cases: email is required and should be validated

endpoints.title: Delete a Contact
edge_cases: DESTRUCTIVE - Require explicit confirmation before calling

endpoints.title: Get a User
endpoints.description: Get a single sub-user by ID

endpoints.title: Create a User
edge_cases: password field is sensitive - DO NOT LOG

endpoints.title: Get a Tag
endpoints.description: Get a single tag by ID

endpoints.title: Delete a Tag
edge_cases: DESTRUCTIVE - May affect contacts with this tag

endpoints.title: Get a Group
endpoints.description: Get a single tag group by ID

endpoints.title: Delete a Group
edge_cases: DESTRUCTIVE - May orphan tags in this group

endpoints.title: Get a Label
endpoints.description: Get a single tag label by ID

endpoints.title: Get a Field
endpoints.description: Get a single custom field by ID
edge_cases: Returns 400 instead of 404 for not found

endpoints.title: Get a Group
endpoints.description: Get a single custom field group by ID
edge_cases: Returns 400 instead of 404 for not found

endpoints.title: Create a Group
endpoints.description: Create a new custom field group

edge_cases: DESTRUCTIVE - Sets deleted=true and deletedAt timestamp

endpoints.title: Get a Domain
endpoints.description: Get a single domain by ID

endpoints.title: Get all Domains
doc_artifacts: Example response shows tag data instead of domain data (copy-paste error)

endpoints.title: Get Integration Domains
endpoints.description: Get available SMTP domains for an integration

endpoints.title: Delete a Domain
edge_cases: DESTRUCTIVE - Sets deleted=true and deletedAt timestamp
